headline: Nvidia Q3 earnings, Fed commentary: What to Watch
summary: Asking for a Trend anchor Josh Lipton details the key events investors will be watching tomorrow, Wednesday, November 20. Nvidia (NVDA) takes the spotlight as it prepares to release its third quarter earnings results, with market participants eager to see if the company can maintain its growth trajectory. Other notable companies reporting include TJX Companies (TJX), Palo Alto Networks (PANW), Target (TGT), Snowflake (SNOW), Williams-Sonoma (WSM), and NIO (NIO). Meanwhile, the financial world will hear commentary from Federal Reserve governors Lisa Cook, Michelle Bowman, and Boston Fed President Susan Collins. Their speeches will provide insights into the central banks monetary policy and economic outlooks. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Asking for a Trend here. This post was written by Angel Smith
